text: Every hour, Nexus makes millions of decisions.
Which message, for which person, on which channel.
It starts with behavior.
Hightouch syncs each user's history into Nexus.
Ten signals per user become a feature vector.
Open rates, send-time, recency, giving tier, and more.
K-means clustering groups similar vectors into personas.
caption: k-means clustering groups similar vectors into personas.

text: Behavioral archetypes, discovered automatically.
Each message is an arm of a multi-armed bandit.
Per persona, Nexus tracks how every arm performs,
as a Beta distribution of successes and failures.
To choose, it samples each arm's distribution
and sends the highest draw.
That balances exploration with exploitation.
The winning variant goes out through Braze,
as a push, an email, or an in app message.
caption: as a push, an email, or an in-app message.

text: When the user engages, the event flows back.
A tiered, time-discounted reward updates the arm.
Success raises alpha. Silence raises beta.
Every cycle sharpens the distributions.
The system gets more precise with every send.
Nexus. A contextual bandit for lifecycle messaging.
